title: OpenTitan lc_ctrl -> KMAC CDC missing synchronizer
tagline: A clock-domain crossing your simulator can't see.
hook_30s: This bug shipped through RTL simulation and was found in gate-level simulation — hundreds of regression hours wasted. It's a clock-domain crossing inside OpenTitan's life-cycle controller, on the path to the cryptographic accelerator. ChipGPT finds it in 23 seconds, before GLS.

proof.note: Invisible to RTL simulation. Found by clock-domain (structural) analysis — not simulation, not functional formal.

steps.agent: Task: CDC analysis of the lc_ctrl -> KMAC interface. Note: RTL simulation is blind to CDC bugs — this needs structural analysis of clock domains.
Reading the CDC methodology. Rule: every cross-domain signal must pass through prim_flop_2sync or a CDC handshake.
Key point: an unsynchronized crossing is invisible to zero-delay RTL sim; it only surfaces at GLS or silicon. So we do NOT rely on simulation here.
Parsing lc_ctrl_kmac_if.sv. Enumerating clock domains: clk_io_div4_i (source), clk_main_i (destination). Tracing every signal across the boundary.
lc_token_i is generated in the io_div4 domain. Following it to its sampling flop in the main domain.

CDC VIOLATION. lc_token_i (io_div4 domain) is sampled directly by token_q on clk_main_i with no synchronizer between them. No prim_flop_2sync, no handshake. 1 of the crossing signals on this interface is unsynchronized. Metastability risk into the KMAC crypto accelerator. This is the bug that escaped RTL sim and was caught in GLS.
Generating the CDC stability assertion (formal, not simulation).

artifact.explanation: On the destination clock, a correctly synchronized crossing signal is stable for >=2 cycles before it is used.
artifact.result: Structural CDC check FAILS: crossing has no synchronizer (depth 0, required >= 2)

artifact.title: lc_ctrl -> KMAC CDC missing synchronizer
artifact.root_cause: io_div4-domain signal sampled directly in the main domain; no 2-flop synchronizer.
artifact.fix: Insert prim_flop_2sync #(.Width(8)) on lc_token_i before token_q.
artifact.impact: Metastability into the KMAC crypto accelerator. Invisible to RTL sim; surfaces at GLS/silicon.
artifact.why_agent_wins: Found by structural clock-domain analysis in seconds — the customer's RTL simulator cannot see this class of bug at all.

steps.agent: Appending the traceability row + CDC dashboard entry.

artifact.test: cdc_report: 1 of N crossing signals unsynchronized
